scripts.check: node --check site/app.js && node --check site/server.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-race-data.mjs && node --check scripts/apply-manual-overrides.mjs && node --check scripts/enrich-official-race-data.mjs
scripts.data:refresh: npm run data:apply && npm run data:quality
scripts.data:refresh:online: npm run data:apply && npm run data:enrich:official && npm run data:quality
